title: RSW Make Your Own Christmas Crackers 13.5 Inch – 6 Pack with 2 Assorted Berry Designs – Eco-Friendly DIY Kit with Hats, Mottos & Tags – Recyclable Festive Party Decoration
features: FESTIVE DIY KIT – Six make your own Christmas crackers, each measuring 13.5 inches when assembled, ideal for adding a personal touch to your Christmas celebrations.
TWO ASSORTED DESIGNS – Features a mix of white and red berry-themed patterns, giving you a traditional yet elegant look for your festive table setting.
ALL-INCLUSIVE SET – Comes complete with ribbon ties, mottos, paper hats and six name tags for easy personalisation.
FILL WITH YOUR OWN TREATS – Add small gifts, sweets or trinkets inside to make each cracker unique and memorable for your family and guests.
ECO-FRIENDLY – Both the crackers and the packaging are fully recyclable, making this an environmentally conscious choice for festive décor.
description: Celebrate Christmas in style with the RSW Make Your Own 13.5 Inch Crackers Set. This six-pack includes two assorted berry designs in festive red and white, perfect for adding a traditional touch to your holiday table décor. Each cracker arrives flat-packed and ready for you to assemble at home, offering a fun and creative way to personalise your Christmas celebrations. The set includes everything you need: ribbon ties, paper hats, mottos and six name tags for customisation. Simply fill the crackers with your own small gifts, chocolates, or trinkets to create a unique surprise for family and friends. Once made up, the generous 13.5 inch size ensures they make an eye-catching display for any festive gathering. Designed with sustainability in mind, both the crackers and the packaging are fully recyclable, making this set an eco-friendly choice. Whether you’re looking for a festive craft activity, a way to involve children in Christmas preparations, or a stylish addition to your dinner table, these make your own crackers are a perfect option. WARNING! DO NOT PULL INNER OUTSIDE PARTY CRACKER. PULL CRACKER AWAY FROM FACE. DO NOT PULL NEAR EYES OR EARS. PULL BOTH ENDS AT ARMS LENGTH FIRMLY AND SHARPLY. DO NOT REMOVE INNER. WARNING! Not suitable for children under 3 years due to small parts which could represent a choking hazard. Contents may include glass and items with functional sharp points or edges. Adult supervision is required. Items may fall from crackers whilst pulling.
